title: mentha viretorum
intro: Mentha viretorum, also known as Corn Mint or Bowles' Mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha viretorum include relief from nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to support respiratory health. Mentha viretorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
